title: Stable Cam
description: A stable third person camera mode for recording cinematics and playing in a new perspective. Basically the opposite of Freelook.
body: ## Support Me ![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png) ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png) ![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png) ## This mod was made for this video: ## Information client-side mod that adds a new stable camera/perspective mode, perfect for recording challenges or cinematics. this is a fabric mod for 1.21 and 1.21.1. to use the mod on forge or neoforge, make sure you also have [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) and [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) installed. ## Public Usage if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this mod in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video. - **as long as you credit me,** you may use this mod or assets from this mod in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports - **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this pack or assets from this pack. - **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
